title: Supabase-Authoritative Monday.com Sync With Dry-Run Ledger And Hold Gates
summary: Reusable blueprint for synchronizing normalized claim records from Supabase/Postgres into Monday.com boards while preserving Supabase as the source of truth. The pattern uses read-only inspection, dry-run create/update/skip planning, explicit hold buckets, verified re-read after writes, and separate ledger updates so Monday never becomes the audit source.
